overall_conclusion.recommendation: Yandex SmartCaptcha is blocking Apify proxy scraping. Direct Apify-based Yandex SERP scraping is not reliably possible. Consider using a dedicated SERP API (e.g., SerpApi, Seranking) or the existing Google Search Console data instead.
